_comment: Parity fixtures for createTag. Each fixture has existing tag rows plus the requested name and intended use. The expected value is the object returned by createTag(). Both adapters must reproduce `expected` exactly for every fixture.

input.tags: Array of existing rows from the `tags` table. Fields: id, name, is_hidden, sort_order, intended_use.
input.request: Object passed to createTag. Fields: name and intendedUse.
input.supabaseAssignedId: The id returned by the mocked Supabase insert response.

schema.expected: Object with the new tag id, per js/data/contracts/createTag.md.

fixtures.name: 01-recipe-tag-empty-database
fixtures.description: Create one recipe tag when no tags exist yet.

fixtures.name: 03-after-existing-tags
fixtures.description: Create one tag after existing tags are already present.

fixtures.name: 04-clean-name-and-default-use
fixtures.description: Spaces are trimmed and unexpected intended use becomes recipes.
